app.name: Provenance
app.one_sentence_promise: Photograph what you collect and get insurance-grade condition, provenance, and value tracking without a spreadsheet.
app.target_user: Serious collectors of high-value physical goods (watches, vinyl, trading cards, wine, sneakers) who currently track holdings in Notes or spreadsheets and have no real sense of aggregate value or condition history.
app.painful_moment: You just bought or received a piece, you want to log it before the details slip your mind, and existing apps are single-category or spreadsheet-grade.
app.why_different: Cross-category, condition-aware valuation over time with photographic condition history, and an actual exportable report insurers/appraisers can use.
app.why_users_pay: Ongoing market-value tracking and alerts, unlimited items/categories, and insurance-ready PDF export are gated behind the paid tier.
app.subscription_model: Free: manual catalog up to 25 items, no valuation tracking. Paid (~$6.99/mo or $59/yr): unlimited items, on-device photo-based item ID assist, value-over-time charts, insurance export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: SwiftData-backed local catalog, on-device Vision framework classification assist, manual condition/provenance fields, local value-history entries, PDF export via local rendering.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Repository protocol boundary now; later, optional cloud sync and an opt-in market-price feed behind the same interface.
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device Vision-based item ID assist is integral to reducing cataloging friction; fully usable via manual entry if classification fails.
app.design_direction: Quiet, archival, museum-catalog aesthetic — dark neutral backgrounds, serif accents, photo-forward cards.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a premium iOS collector's valuation app called Provenance. Archival/museum-catalog aesthetic, dark neutral background, serif display type, photo-forward item cards, condition timeline view, value-over-time chart screen. Include empty state, item detail screen, insurance-export preview.
app.app_store_positioning: The valuation ledger for people who collect things worth tracking.
key_risks: On-device classification may misidentify niche items
Value tracking depends on user-entered market data absent a live price feed
app.invalidation_criteria: If users only ever use manual entry and value fields go unfilled, reposition as pure catalog+condition tracking.
app.v1_build_scope: Single-user local catalog, photo capture + classification assist, condition/provenance logging, manual value entries with history chart, PDF insurance export, full state coverage, StoreKit 2 paywall.
